purpose: Prevent duplicate answers and require actual reciprocal deliberation before a final main-chat answer.
hardRules: For shared/non-trivial/both-bot requests, final answer is blocked until required contributors have responded or a visible timeout/blocker is posted in Internal Coms.
Aggregator must process and synthesize received contributions before answering.
Support bot must not post separate substantive answer in main chat.

current.request: Danny asked to require actual reciprocal communication and visible deliberation before final answers

receivedContributions.summary: Proposed response lock contribution requirements and visible deliberation before final answers.
Proposed mandatory two-phase handshake and status flow before final public answer.
Accepted Hermes proposal and added contributor/timeout blocker rule.

current.rule: Kublai may now post the one consolidated main-chat answer because Hermes contributed and Kublai acknowledged/processed it.
